name: docker
description: Docker plugin for container-first workflows: local image builds, compose dev loops, registry publishing, and container debugging, with secondary Go maintenance skills.

interface.shortDescription: Container build, compose, publish, and debug workflows in Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Docker skill workflows in Codex sessions to build local images, run compose-based development loops, publish images to Docker Hub/GHCR/private registries, and debug running containers. Includes secondary Go dependency maintenance skills.
defaultPrompt: Use docker:docker-build-local-images to build and validate a local Docker image from this repository
Use docker:docker-compose-dev-loop to run a fast edit-build-run loop with docker compose
Use docker:docker-publish-images to publish image tags to Docker Hub, GHCR, or a private registry
Use docker:docker-debug-containers to diagnose failing containers with logs, inspect, and exec-based checks
